name: small metal cabin
description: I'm in a small metal cabin
hints: A living quarters with a bed-like platform and a plastic wafer. The wafer is an important item.
GET WAFER - this small plastic wafer is likely a key card or data storage device used elsewhere.
The wafer may be used in a console, slot, or reader elsewhere on the ship. The soft platform is a sleeping surface. Go SOUTH to return to the main corridor.
notes: Crew cabin with a sleeping platform and a small plastic wafer. The wafer is a key item - likely a key card or data chip used in control consoles or security readers elsewhere on the ship. South exit returns to the main corridor (room 21).
